commands.repair_reason: Human maintainer review is needed because the PR is protected, stacked on an open base, lacks current-head proof, and requires a policy/upgrade decision.; Cleared: No dependency, workflow, install, or code-execution supply-chain regression was found; the security-sensitive issues are captured as merge-risk policy semantics. commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Gateway exposure evidence, policy/doctor findings, tests, and docs to the bundled Policy plugin while carrying the open secrets/auth policy base.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for a feature PR. Source inspection confirms the new config-only Policy evidence and doctor/lint paths, and the remaining questions are merge proof and policy semantics rather than a current-main bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer review is needed because the PR is protected, stacked on an open base, lacks current-head proof, and requires a policy/upgrade decision.

target.title: Policy: add gateway exposure checks
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a Policy 1.0 Gateway exposure conformance category with config-only evidence and doctor/lint findings.

Logical base: #81974 after skipping #81104. This PR intentionally does not include runtime audit, gateway protocol, approval metadata, Swift protocol, or before-tool-call changes.

- Records Gateway bind/auth/rate-limit/Control UI/Tailscale/remote/HTTP posture as policy evidence.
- Enforces non-loopback bind, disabled auth, missing explicit rate-limit posture, insecure Control UI toggles, Tailscale Funnel, remote mode, HTTP endpoints, and unrestricted URL-fetch posture.
- Documents the new Gateway policy rules and evidence shape.

## Policy syntax

```jsonc
{
  "gateway": {
    "exposure": {
      "allowNonLoopbackBind": false,
      "allowTailscaleFunnel": false,
    },
    "auth": {
      "requireAuth": true,
      "requireExplicitRateLimit": true,
    },
    "controlUi": {
      "allowInsecure": false,
    },
    "remote": {
      "allow": false,
    },
    "http": {
      "denyEndpoints": ["chatCompletions", "responses"],
      "requireUrlAllowlists": true,
    },
  },
}
```

## Safety

This is config-level conformance only. `doctor --lint` and `policy check` read existing OpenClaw config and report findings. This PR does not launch a Gateway, mutate Gateway config, change Gateway runtime behavior, or add runtime enforcement.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: adds policy conformance evidence and findings for Gateway, Control UI, WebChat, and HTTP exposure settings, including unsafe remote binding, disabled auth, missing rate-limit posture, insecure Control UI toggles, Tailscale Funnel, remote gateway mode, enabled HTTP endpoints, and unrestricted URL-fetch posture.

Real environment tested: WSL checkout at `/root/src/openclaw-81981-policy` on Ubuntu-24.04 after rebase onto signed #81974 head `33ee2531d1`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

- `node --no-maglev node_modules\vitest\vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts --run --reporter=dot`
- `node node_modules\@typescript\native-preview\bin\tsgo.js -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test-policy-81981-config.tsbuildinfo`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx -- docs/cli/policy.md docs/plugins/reference/policy.md`
- `git diff --check --cached`
- `node scripts/check-deadcode-unused-files.mjs`

Evidence after fix:

![PR #81981 Gateway exposure policy before/after proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-81981-fresh/pr-81981/pr-81981-gateway-exposure-policy-before-after-proof.png)

Observed result after fix: focused policy doctor/CLI tests passed 2 files and 80 tests. Extension tsgo, docs MDX, diff whitespace, and deadcode unused-file checks passed. Head commit `04e8ff066f` is signed and GitHub-verified.

What was not tested: no live Gateway server was launched for this proof image. The proof verifies policy doctor/lint behavior against config/policy files.

## Related

- #80783 - Policy: add model, network, and MCP conformance checks
- #81974 - Policy: add secret and auth conformance checks
target.author: giodl73-repo
